title: How to set a default / starting category to IS page
body: **Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?** **Bug** / **Question** **Bug: What is the current behavior?** I want to programatically set a starting / default category to a hierarchical widget. Use-case: Right now in our Magento extension, you can disable autocomplete menu and enabled instant search feature, which means when you search by using a search box in a header, you get the JadoPado experience with instant search page. At the same time, you can replace category pages with instant search as well, so the users can benefit from Algolia filters even on category pages. The issue is, that when you are on a category page, the search box in a header of the website searches only products within the category. (this is achieved by setting a `rootPath` in hierarchical widget) And I want to give a user a possibility to remove the category refinement and search again in a whole catalog. I try to do it via `searchParameters`: ```js var attribute = 'categories.level' + algoliaConfig.request.level; var facetRefinements = {}; facetRefinements[attribute] = [algoliaConfig.request.path]; var searchParameters = { facetsRefinements: facetRefinements, facets: [attribute] } ``` It then appears in `currentRefinementValues`: But when I click on a category in `hierarchicalWidget` it won’t replace the previously set category: (now I expect only “Sale” category to be displayed and used for filtering). And another issue is when I remove all category filters by clicking them out from `currentRefinements` widget, then select a random category, and remove it by clicking on it again in hierarchical widget, it somehow returns the default category. Probably better to see it on GIF: ![06shnasqea](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/1058144/21826802/d11453e2-d73d-11e6-8b46-b080301c533a.gif) I tried to achieve the behaviour even by using `rootPath` parameter of the hierarchical widget and not `searchParameters`. It works OK, refines data, shows the value in current refinements. But after removing the category from current refinements widget, the hierarchical widget is not displayed - seems to be empty. **Bug: What is the expected behavior?** The consistent behaviour between what is selected in hierarchical widget and displayed in current refinement values widget. Possibility to somehow set a starting / default category for IS pages. **Bug: What browsers are impacted? Which versions?** Not browser related. **jsFiddles** Solution with `rootPath` - https://jsfiddle.net/JanPetr/0rbg8Lzt/ Solution with `searchParameters` - https://jsfiddle.net/JanPetr/pw2s7zcw/ Unfortunately I'm not able to reproduce the issue from posted GIF in jsFiddle (the issue which returns back the default category when category refinement is removed in hierarchical widget, not current refinements widget). I will add it when I'll manage to reproduce. **What project are you opening an issue for?** - instantsearch.js **What is the version you are using? Always use the latest one before opening a bug issue.** The latest one
